title: Charge $150/hr without burning out
meta_description: Learn the real numbers behind freelance developer rates in 2026 — taxes, tools, and scope creep eat 40% of quoted rates. Build a dashboard that tracks your actual earnings per hour.
prewritten_tweet:

Reality: taxes, tools, and scope creep eat 40% of that.
